What We Do

Our Painting Services

Expert craftsmanship for every surface — residential or commercial.

🖌️

Wall & Ceiling Painting

Fresh, flawless wall and ceiling paint finishes using premium interior paints.

🔄

Repainting & Touch-up

Refresh faded or chipped walls to look brand new with precision touch-up work.

🔧

Wall Crack Repair

Professional filling and sealing of wall cracks before painting for a smooth result.

⬜

Putty Work & Wall Leveling

Even, smooth surface preparation with quality putty and leveling compounds.

🔨

Drywall Repair

Expert drywall patching and repair before painting for a seamless finish.

✨

Sanding & Polishing

Surface sanding and polishing to achieve the perfect base for any paint or finish.

🎨

Texture & Designer Wall Painting

Stunning textures — sand, sponge, stone — and custom designer wall effects.

🖼️

Accent Wall Painting

Bold, stylish accent walls to add depth and character to any room.

🚪

Cabinet Painting & Polishing

Cabinet refinishing with smooth paint and polish finishes for kitchens and wardrobes.

💧

Waterproofing

Expert waterproofing for roofs, walls, and bathrooms to prevent leakage permanently.

🌳

Exterior Painting

Weather-resistant exterior coatings that protect and beautify your home for years.

🏛️

Perma Design

Permanent decorative wall design finishes for a lasting, premium aesthetic.

🏢

Commercial Interior Painting

Large-scale interior painting for offices, showrooms, and commercial spaces.

🏗️

Exterior & Facade Painting

Weather-resistant exterior coatings for commercial buildings, factories, and warehouses.

🔄

Repainting & Maintenance

Scheduled repainting and touch-up services for commercial properties with minimal disruption.

🔧

Wall Crack & Surface Repair

Crack filling, surface preparation and leveling for commercial walls before painting.

🎨

Texture & Designer Finishes

Corporate-grade texture and designer wall finishes for reception areas and lobbies.

🧹

Pressure Washing (Exterior)

High-pressure cleaning of building exteriors before painting for better adhesion.

🏭

Industrial Floor & Epoxy Painting

Durable epoxy floor coatings for warehouses, factories, and parking areas.

💧

Commercial Waterproofing

Large-scale waterproofing solutions for rooftops, terraces, and commercial structures.

⬜

Putty Work & Wall Leveling

Commercial-grade putty and wall preparation for smooth, professional paint finishes.

✨

Polish & Wood Finish

PU, melamine and enamel finishes for office furniture, doors, and woodwork.

🏛️

New Construction Painting

End-to-end painting solutions for new commercial buildings from bare wall to ready.

🖼️

Accent & Brand Wall Painting

Custom branded accent walls and feature walls to reflect corporate identity.

Our Story

Our Legacy

We are a proud Khalas family with over 35 years of experience in painting. Painting is not just our work — it is our tradition, passed down through generations.

With the blessings of Lord Jagannath, we have had the honour of painting the sacred Jagannath Rath for more than three decades — a matter of devotion, faith, and pride.

Our community has long been known for its expertise in painting, and through years of hard work, we have mastered both traditional and modern techniques.

Today, every project reflects our commitment to quality, precision, and customer satisfaction.

🛕

Jagannath Rath Painting

Honoured to paint the sacred Jagannath Rath for over 30 years — devotion, faith, and pride.
